catalogue.title: Man-in-the-Middle Attack
catalogue.briefDescription: An attacker intercepts and potentially alters communication between two parties without their knowledge.

catalogue.title: Credential Stuffing
catalogue.briefDescription: An attacker uses large sets of leaked username and password pairs to gain unauthorised access by automating login attempts across multiple services.

catalogue.title: Log Tampering
catalogue.briefDescription: An attacker modifies or deletes audit logs to hide malicious activity or deny having performed certain actions, undermining accountability.
